# VectorAdd assembly dump

config: ptx_h2_v4_cs
size: 16384x16384
raw PTX: /home/henrylhtsang/cute-exercise/cute_exercise/ex29_best_vector_add/dump/ptx_h2_v4_cs_16384.ptx
raw SASS: /home/henrylhtsang/cute-exercise/cute_exercise/ex29_best_vector_add/dump/ptx_h2_v4_cs_16384.sass

## PTX

```ptx
//
// Generated by NVIDIA NVVM Compiler
//
// Compiler Build ID: CL-36699951
// Cuda compilation tools, release 13.1, V13.1.66
// Based on NVVM 21.0.0
//

.version 9.1
.target sm_100a
.address_size 64

	// .globl	kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0

.visible .entry kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0(
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0_param_0[8],
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0_param_1[8],
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0_param_2[8],
	.param .u32 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0_param_3
)
.reqntid 256, 1, 1
{
	.reg .pred 	%p<3>;
	.reg .b32 	%r<32>;
	.reg .b64 	%rd<14>;

	ld.param.b64 	%rd5, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0_param_0];
	ld.param.b64 	%rd6, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0_param_1];
	ld.param.b64 	%rd7, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_204813107212048_tensorptrf16_gmem_0_param_2];
	mov.u32 	%r31, %ctaid.x;
	setp.gt.u32 	%p1, %r31, 131071;
	@%p1 bra 	$L__BB0_3;
	mov.u32 	%r5, %tid.x;
	mul.wide.u32 	%rd1, %r5, 8;
	mov.u32 	%r2, %nctaid.x;
$L__BB0_2:
	shl.b32 	%r30, %r31, 11;
	cvt.s64.s32 	%rd11, %r30;
	add.s64 	%rd12, %rd11, %rd1;
	shl.b64 	%rd13, %rd12, 1;
	add.s64 	%rd8, %rd5, %rd13;
	add.s64 	%rd9, %rd6, %rd13;
	add.s64 	%rd10, %rd7, %rd13;
	// begin inline asm
	ld.global.cs.v4.u32 {%r6, %r7, %r8, %r9}, [%rd8];
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	ld.global.cs.v4.u32 {%r10, %r11, %r12, %r13}, [%rd9];
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r14, %r6, %r10;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r17, %r7, %r11;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r20, %r8, %r12;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r23, %r9, %r13;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	st.global.cs.v4.u32 [%rd10], {%r14, %r17, %r20, %r23};
	// end inline asm
	add.s32 	%r31, %r31, %r2;
	setp.lt.s32 	%p2, %r31, 131072;
	@%p2 bra 	$L__BB0_2;
$L__BB0_3:
	ret;

}

```

        /*0000*/                   LDC R1, c[0x0][0x37c] ;
        /*0010*/                   S2R R0, SR_CTAID.X ;
        /*0020*/                   ISETP.GT.U32.AND P0, PT, R0, 0x1ffff, PT ;
        /*0030*/               @P0 EXIT ;
        /*0040*/                   S2R R17, SR_TID.X ;
        /*0050*/                   LDC R19, c[0x0][0x370] ;
        /*0060*/                   LDCU.64 UR4, c[0x0][0x358] ;
        /*0070*/                   LDCU.64 UR6, c[0x0][0x390] ;
        /*0080*/                   LDCU.128 UR8, c[0x0][0x380] ;
.L_x_0:
        /*0090*/                   IMAD.SHL.U32 R2, R0, 0x800, RZ ;
        /*00a0*/                   SHF.R.S32.HI R3, RZ, 0x1f, R2 ;
        /*00b0*/                   IMAD.WIDE.U32 R2, R17, 0x8, R2 ;
        /*00c0*/                   IMAD.SHL.U32 R12, R2.reuse, 0x2, RZ ;
        /*00d0*/                   SHF.L.U64.HI R3, R2, 0x1, R3 ;
        /*00e0*/                   IADD3 R4, P0, PT, R12.reuse, UR8, RZ ;
        /*00f0*/                   IADD3 R8, P1, PT, R12, UR10, RZ ;
        /*0100*/                   IADD3.X R5, PT, PT, R3.reuse, UR9, RZ, P0, !PT ;

        /*0120*/                   LDG.E.EF.128 R4, desc[UR4][R4.64] ;
        /*0130*/                   LDG.E.EF.128 R8, desc[UR4][R8.64] ;
        /*0140*/                   IADD3 R2, P0, PT, R12, UR6, RZ ;
        /*0150*/                   IMAD.IADD R0, R19, 0x1, R0 ;
        /*0160*/                   IADD3.X R3, PT, PT, R3, UR7, RZ, P0, !PT ;
        /*0170*/                   ISETP.GE.AND P0, PT, R0, 0x20000, PT ;
        /*0180*/                   HFMA2 R12, R4, 1, 1, R8 ;
        /*0190*/                   HADD2 R13, R5, R9 ;
        /*01a0*/                   HFMA2 R14, R6, 1, 1, R10 ;
        /*01b0*/                   HADD2 R15, R7, R11 ;
        /*01c0*/                   STG.E.EF.128 desc[UR4][R2.64], R12 ;
        /*01d0*/              @!P0 BRA `(.L_x_0) ;
        /*01e0*/                   EXIT ;
.L_x_1:
        /*01f0*/                   BRA `(.L_x_1);
        /*0200*/                   NOP;
        /*0210*/                   NOP;
        /*0220*/                   NOP;
        /*0230*/                   NOP;
        /*0240*/                   NOP;
        /*0250*/                   NOP;
        /*0260*/                   NOP;
        /*0270*/                   NOP;
.L_x_2:
